series_metadata.series_description: Report documents positive laboratory findings, epidemiological cases, contracts, suspects, associates as well as patient identification and location. A) in-state contacts, associates, and suspects (see retention period) B) out-of-state contacts, associates and suspects (same as STD-33-04 (a)) C) Laboratory Positives (same as STD 33-04(a)). After "central search" search, either new-entry or up-date is entered into registry.
